title: Spear of Justice
body:
# Spear of Justice!
Ever wanted to be like the legendary fish warrior? Well now you can!
I present you an animated mix of Undyne's spears in vanilla-like style for Mounts of Mayhem drop!
## How to use?
![How to properly rename a spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e80622a39e3f6c4f6aba71615a6904bc88bafdbf.png)</br>
Rename any of your spears to "**Spear of Justice**" to get the animated version and enjoy!
- Add "**UT**" or "**DR**" at the end for the Undertale and Deltarune versions respectfully _(yeah UT and DR spears have a different look if you didn't know!)_
